title: OtpVerified
description: Event: `otp_verified`. Emitted when the caller's OTP attempt succeeds, or when a pre-auth HMAC makes OTP unnecessary. The session is now authenticated at the required level and the paused agent workflow resumes. A streaming sequence (`stream_chunk` / `stream_token` → `eventual_response`) follows.

requestId.description: Echoes the `requestId` from the originating `verify_otp` action.
The request ID this verification belongs to.

message.description: Short human-readable confirmation message (e.g. `Identity verified successfully.`).

timestamp.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when the event was emitted.
